question: An aircraft has four engines (i.e., two on each wing) but can land using just any three or more engines. Assume that the reliability of each engine for the duration of a mission is $\mathrm{R}_{\mathrm{e}}=0.997$ and that engine failures are independent. Calculate the mission reliability of the aircraft.
answer:
Given $R_e=0.997$. The mission reliability of the aircraft is given by

$$
R_{	ext {system }}=\sum_{i=3}^4 inom{4}{i}(0.997)^i(0.003)^{4-i}=0.9999462
$$
